exceptions.exposure: Build-time parsing of static Wayland protocol XML through wayland-scanner; application and provider data do not reach this parser at runtime.
exceptions.dependencyPath: qa-scribe-tauri -> tauri-plugin-clipboard-manager 2.3.2 -> arboard 3.6.1 -> wl-clipboard-rs 0.9.3 -> wayland-protocols 0.32.13 -> wayland-scanner 0.31.10 -> quick-xml 0.39.4
exceptions.blocker: wayland-scanner 0.31.10 constrains quick-xml below the patched 0.41 line.
exceptions.removalTrigger: A Wayland or clipboard dependency permits quick-xml >=0.41.0.

exceptions.exposure: Linux GUI runtime through GTK3/WebKit. QA Scribe does not directly call VariantStrIter, but the affected API remains reachable transitively.
exceptions.dependencyPath: qa-scribe-tauri -> tauri 2.11.5 -> tauri-runtime-wry 2.11.4 -> gtk 0.18.2 -> glib 0.18.5
exceptions.blocker: Tauri's Linux WebKit/GTK graph remains on gtk-rs 0.18; the fix requires glib >=0.20.0.
exceptions.removalTrigger: Tauri's Linux runtime moves to a gtk-rs line using glib >=0.20.0.
